channel.title: Pages on Eric
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Eric

item.title: About
item.description:
English Version

About Me: Embroidery Artist & Pattern Designer

I’m a passionate embroidery enthusiast specializing in creating stitchable embroidery patterns and design files. Threads are my palette, fabric is my canvas, and I transform inspiration into actionable embroidery projects.

What I Offer

  • ✂️ Original Embroidery Patterns: Ready-to-use files with stitching guides
  • 🧵 Custom Designs: Personalized embroidery solutions for your ideas
  • 📐 Art-to-Stitch Conversion: Transform images/concepts into embroidery-ready artwork
  • 📚 Resource Sharing: Tutorials and technique documentation

My Expertise

Specializing in [Your specialty, e.g.: botanical motifs/traditional patterns/modern minimalism/character designs] styles, with mastery in techniques like [Your techniques, e.g.: French knots/satin stitch/3D embroidery].

Let’s Connect & Create

I’m eager to connect with fellow enthusiasts! Whether you want to:

  • Discuss embroidery techniques
  • Commission custom embroidery files
  • Collaborate on creative projects
  • Share your own embroidery work

Reach me at [your email/social media links]. Feel free to share your stitching stories in the comments - let’s inspire each other and grow together in this beautiful craft!
